case_title: DEVENDRA PATEL VS. DAVID PATTERSON et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY ; DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $42.74 AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, DAVID JETTER, HEVIG
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TWO R.E.D. FILED) AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, DAVID JETTER, HEVIG
